---
title: "Certifications & Degrees"
toc: false
---

## Degrees

### Master of Data Science
**University of British Columbia** | Vancouver, BC, Canada | 2025 - 2026

### Bachelor of Business Administration
**Simon Fraser University** | Burnaby, BC, Canada | 2012 - 2018
Joint major in Business and Computer Science

---

## Certifications

### [Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Fundamentals](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/users/williamsung-5840/credentials/85d3dfed6ff4d30b){target="_blank"}
**Microsoft** | October 2023

### [Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/users/williamsung-5840/credentials/9bc451f8adede7eb){target="_blank"}
**Microsoft** | July 2023

### SFU Certified: Business Analytics & Decision Making
**Simon Fraser University** | June 2018
